title: Fix PDF viewer clip/duplicate strips
description:
PDF Viewer no longer scales crop insets and natW when unifying page width — that misaligned native iframe margins and caused duplicated/clipped strips (red text doubling at sheet edges). True PDF dimensions are preserved; display scale uses CSS transform. Corrupted page dims auto-heal from legacy pieces on normalize.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg78). Re-open Avalon or any plan if strips persist once.
changeLog: Stop scaling PDF crop/nat dims on viewer width unify.
Apply viewDispScale via CSS transform on native wrap/canvas.
Skip reconcile clamp that undid unified layout width.
Heal corrupted natW from legacy piece metadata on normalize.
H12 ingest for media sync diagnostics. Cache bust dbg78.
